turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content:
So, the issue I'm having is work-related. My son had heart surgery a few months ago. He now has a pacemaker. He's also in the middle of testing for CP. My job requires that I be around a lot of people. I always wear a mask...but sometimes the people I am with do not. Nor do they respect the 6-foot boundary.
A simple cold gives my son a fever of 103. Im scared that if I continue to work, Im putting him in danger. But if I stop, I can no longer afford bills.

results.term: I have. A few people respected my wishes. But one ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have. A few people respected my wishes. But one in particular stands out. A gentleman who told me he had a medical condition and proceeded to get in my face. He got angry at my request.

results.term: In my shoes, what would you do?

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: In my shoes, what would you do?

turn_info.content: I feel trapped because, what are my options? Continue to work.....my son gets sick and dies. His pediatrician has already warned me how deadly this could be for me.

turn_info.content: And if I quit? No money? I have a 5 year old I have to take care of too.

turn_info.content: I've spoken to my boss. He was sympathetic about it all....At this point I'm not sure what to do.

results.term: Those are fairly decent ideas. The struggle for mo...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Those are fairly decent ideas. The struggle for money would still be an issue if I worked part-time. And I doubt I could find a better job at this particular time. With that being said, I didn't think to see if the boss would let me work in the office for a bit. I know my fellow employees would respect my wishes.

results.term: That sounds like a reasonable thing to do.
